text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has overturned the fate Parcae
predicted for her and made it safely through her
first three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's left such a strong impression that people
refer to this time as the Air Shakur era.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ah, here it is.
...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As usual, she's spent a lot of time thinking today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But some things have changed. All around us...

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Oh, the time's gone up! Moirai is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we still need to tweak your training a little.
Let's input today's training data into Moirai.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: More and more people are using Moirai, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey. Keep your voice down. Someone's gonna hear you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the Arima Kinen, Air Shakur suddenly
decided to make part of Parcae freely accessible
online.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It rocked the Umamusume world, upending
everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, everyone had access to race
simulations and a perfect comprehensive training
program catered to each individual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, the program was released
anonymously. The academy has been searching
high and low for the programmer who brought
about such an immense contribution to the
Umamusume racing world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although it hasn't been confirmed, those with
keen intuition have put two and two together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Every damn day... Will you stop, already? I said it
wasn't me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... My apologies. However, that is not what I
wish to speak with you about today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
While I do suspect you to be the true creator,
let's imagine for a moment that Moirai was
created by some unknown benefactor. What do
you think his intentions were?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why did this anonymous figure release Moirai?
What was his goal? I can hardly believe it was
simply from the goodness of his heart.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: He probably wanted to collect data for free.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's what I initially thought as well.
However...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All of the students are seeing immense growth
thanks to Moirai.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That said, it's nothing more than a comprehensive
support system. It constantly seeks the thoughts
and judgement of the users.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If the creator's goal was merely data collection,
there would be no reason to program it in that
way.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the creator of Moirai had a... greater
vision in mind. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How should I know?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur suddenly falls silent, and doesn't say
anything more after that.
choice_data_list: What were you about to say earlier?
What were you about to say earlier?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Take a guess at what I was gonna say.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That was fast.
choice_data_list: But I do know that you did it for fun.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Eh, I guess you're not entirely wrong.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have any goal or vision or whatever. It's
just...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no point in being at the top of a bunch of
fake losers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The better the people who come after me are, the
more reason there is for me to stick around.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
In every generation, the strongest always rise to
the top.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Obviously. Anyone could see that, and you're just realizing it now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's impossible to learn everything about her. That
applies to everyone. However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Enough pointless chitchat. The next race is
coming up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Let's get training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to continue to watch over her. After all,
I've got all time in the world.
